arts.ttl: Milan Consider Up-and-Coming Serie A Manager to Replace Conceicao
arts.sum: Como manager Cesc Fabregas has emerged as a potential candidate to replace under-fire Sergio Conceicao at Milan. According to Gazzetta dello Sport, last season's Serie A runners-up are contemplating appointing the Spaniard as their new boss at the end of the campaign.
